case_title: STATE FARM BANK VS. LOI BUI et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT BUI, LOI

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF STATE FARM BANK'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS CONTINUED TO NOVEMBER 20, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 TO GIVE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN [DATE] AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 (302/MJM)

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF STATE FARM BANK'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS GRANTED, WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND THE ANSWER. THE COURT NOTES THAT DEFENDANT DID NOT CHECK BOX 3(A) OR 3(B) ON THE FORM ANSWER. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185

NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF STATE FARM BANK'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS OFF CALENDAR. THE MOVING PARTY FAILED TO ATTACH A PROOF OF SERVICE TO THE PLEADINGS OR FILE A COPY OF THE PROOF OF SERVICE FIVE DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING (RULE OF COURT 3.1300(C).) FURTHER, THE MOVING PARTY DID NOT ATTACH A COPY OF THE ANSWER REFERRED TO IN THE MOVING PAPERS. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 =302/MJM

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Nov-20-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF STATE FARM BANK's motion For Judgment On The Pleadings IS Granted, with 10 days leave to amend the Answer. The Court notes that Defendant did not check box 3(a) or 3(b) on the form Answer. No opposition was filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Oct-31-2013 Continued To Nov-20-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF STATE FARM BANK's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is continued to November 20, 2013 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than [date] at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Aug-22-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. SEAN MORISSEY OF JOHNSON MARK LLP, TEL. NO. (801) 285-5740 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF STATE FARM BANK'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is Off calendar. The moving party failed to attach a proof of service to the pleadings or file a copy of the proof of service five days before the hearing (Rule of Court 3.1300(c).) Further, the moving party did not attach a copy of the answer referred to in the moving papers. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/mjm
